summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing processes grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can drive operational excellence—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Manage the {coord|document library, SOPs,} and version control across 20+ programs and 100+ operational standards
Oversee the end-to-end {prog|lifecycle} of process updates from intake through implementation, driving continuous improvement via feedback
Partner across {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales} teams and 10+ vendors to assess {ex|adherence} and align stakeholders on standards
Establish {data|metrics} and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining operations and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and stakeholder interviews to diagnose operational drivers and design audit cycles that validate standards
Upskill the client team to audit 300+ cases and quantify costs, refuting assumptions via {data|data analysis} to drive process change
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed operational strategies
Analyzed 2,000+ responses, reporting {data|data-driven insights} and recommendations to the C-suite
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Delivered 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized {coord|onboarding processes} across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Assisted in employee relations cases, ensuring {ex|compliance} with local labor laws and confidentiality
Directed a Merger & Acquisition project, migrating and merging employee records across systems with version control
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

jd.meta: Lyft — Program Manager, Process Excellence & Standards

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for Lyft (Flexdrive) — Program Manager, Process Excellence & Standards (Nashville, TN AV Depot → Nashville header). Summary → Strategic Program Manager, 'developing processes', operational-excellence flavor. InGenius → Set F: document library/SOPs/version control + 100+ standards, end-to-end lifecycle of process updates intake→implementation, partner cross-functionally + vendors to assess adherence, metrics + documentation (direct JD language). Reordered to lead with SOP/version control. ODN → Pair B + audit-cycle framing (validate standards) + audit/quantification. Vestas → added ER/compliance + version-control on M&A migration. Skills → dropped HRCI/LMS, led with PM + KM tools. NOTE: JD wants 5+ yrs process-standardization + fleet/transportation/regulated-ops background; Jamie's is program/people — domain gap on fleet, but truthful overlap on SOP governance, version control, audit cycles, CAPA-style continuous improvement, cross-functional standards is strong.
